events.name: earth_contact
events.description: Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Repeating pattern in cosmic ray data — statistical fluke or message?

events.name: colonist_conflict
events.description: Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.

meta_awareness.insight: Dax Iron asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

diaries.text:
**Grove Ash** (earth/farmer) — Year 65

The earth in me stirs with possibility.

A message from Earth — like hearing from a ghost.
The signal... I do not know what to think.

*— Grove Ash, farmer*

**Sol Kai-II** (air/sentinel) — Year 65

The air in me stirs with possibility.

A message from Earth — like hearing from a ghost.
The signal... I do not know what to think.

*— Sol Kai-II, sentinel*

**Zeph Wind** (air/trickster) — Year 65

Another year. We are still here.

A message from Earth — like hearing from a ghost.
The signal... I do not know what to think.

*— Zeph Wind, trickster*
